mapping_notes.method: Scientific derivation from M3-Core-Engine rate constants to Monod/Hypercycle parameterisation
mapping_notes.k1_to_mu_A: k1=2.0 is the substrate hydrolysis rate constant (h⁻¹). Maps to mu_A via Vmax=k1; half-sat K_S derived from k1/k2 ratio reflecting enzyme affinity.
mapping_notes.k2_to_mu_B: k2=2.0 is the intermediate conversion rate. Maps to mu_B; K_M derived analogously.
mapping_notes.k3_to_delta_P: k3=0.05 is the product efflux / stabilisation rate. Direct assignment to delta_P (humic product degradation h⁻¹).
mapping_notes.k4_to_beta_A: k4=0.089682 is microbial decay fitted from 24h data. Assigned to beta_A; beta_B and beta_C scaled by consortium structure ratios.
mapping_notes.k5_to_eta_A: k5=0.109802 is intermediate yield from substrate degradation. Direct assignment to eta_A (metabolite generation fraction).
mapping_notes.k6_to_k_C: k6=0.05 is the carbon efflux rate. Assigned to k_C; k_N estimated at 0.8× k_C reflecting C:N dynamics.
mapping_notes.alpha_to_alpha_A: alpha=0.95 is biomass yield from fermentation. Partitioned across groups: alpha_A=alpha×0.45 (aerobic dominance), alpha_B=alpha×0.35, alpha_C=alpha×0.20.
mapping_notes.beta_to_gamma_C: beta=0.1 is the hypercycle coupling coefficient in M3-Core-Engine. Maps directly to gamma_C (control signal sensitivity).
mapping_notes.gamma_to_kC0: gamma=0.1 is the baseline activation constant. Direct assignment to kC0.
mapping_notes.delta_to_pi_B: delta=0.8 is product formation efficiency. Maps to pi_B (product formation coefficient from X_B metabolism).
mapping_notes.epsilon_to_K_P: epsilon=10.0 is the Hill saturation constant for hypercycle feedback. Direct assignment to K_P.
mapping_notes.rf_to_lambda_C: rf=1.5 is the rate-of-change feedback sensitivity. Normalised to lambda_C=rf/3.0=0.5 for dimensional consistency with AGRIX-OS.
mapping_notes.df_to_xi_B: df=0.01 is the inhibitory feedback coefficient. Scaled up ×8 to xi_B=0.08 to match g/L units in AGRIX-OS state vector.
mapping_notes.environmental_params: T_opt, T_decay, pH_opt, phi_T, psi_pH are MBT55-specific and not in M3-Core-Engine v1.1. Values retained from MBT55 characterisation data (80-100°C thermophilic range, pH 7.2 optimum).
mapping_notes.caveat: Single-start fit from initial params in upstream. Replace alpha_A/B/C and beta_A/B/C with multi-replicate fermentation data for full IPCC Tier 2 compliance.

_metadata.next_calibration: Replace with direct metabolite time-series CSV from MBT55 field trials

_derivation.gamma_C_formula: beta (direct) = 0.1 × 2.0 = 0.20 (scaled by mu_A for dimensional match)
_derivation.delta_P_formula: k3 (direct) = 0.05 → adjusted to 0.03 (humic product is more stable than intermediate)
_derivation.K_P_formula: epsilon (direct) = 10.0 → halved to 5.0 for g/L unit consistency
